properties.name: Los Pelambres
properties.caption: Antofagasta · Chile
properties.tagline: Top-10 global copper mine; 319.6 kt Cu produced in 2024 with 2024 reserves of ~2.1 Bt; life-extension project pushes operations to 2051.

properties.name: El Soldado
properties.caption: Anglo American · Chile
properties.tagline: Open-pit Cu mine 132 km north of Santiago; ~48 kt Cu in 2024; US$295 M investment is extending mine life from 2027 to 2037.

properties.name: Los Bronces / Andina
properties.caption: Anglo American · Codelco
properties.tagline: Adjacent giants now under a joint mine plan; together hold ~60 Mt contained Cu — roughly 2% of global copper reserves and resources.

properties.name: El Teniente
properties.caption: Codelco · Chile
properties.tagline: Largest underground copper mine in the world; ~310 kt Cu produced in 2025 (impacted by July collapse); sixth-largest copper reserve globally.

properties.name: San Jorge
properties.tagline: Mendoza's first major modern Cu project; 1.2 Mt Cu resource at 0.48% Cu; US$559M capex, ~40 kt Cu/yr planned from 2029; RIGI-approved.

properties.name: Rio Blanco
properties.tagline: Northern half of the Rio Blanco–Los Bronces district — the world's greatest known concentration of copper.

properties.name: Los Sulfatos
properties.tagline: High-grade hypogene Cu-Mo porphyry 6 km south of Los Bronces; 1.2 Bt inferred at 1.46% Cu (~17.5 Mt contained Cu); exploration target 4–5 Bt.

properties.name: Escalones
properties.tagline: Chile's largest undeveloped oxide-copper resource — 426 Mt at 0.37% Cu inferred (~3.45 Blb Cu); 35 km east of El Teniente.

properties.name: Infiernillo
properties.tagline: Cu-(Mo) porphyry deposit in the San Rafael Massif, southern Mendoza — geologically defined, undeveloped.

properties.name: Cerro Amarillo
properties.tagline: Cluster of five Cu-Mo-Au porphyry intrusions in Malargüe, southern Mendoza; >2,000 ha; early-stage drilling underway.

properties.name: El Perdido
properties.tagline: 2 km × 2 km Cu-Au-Mo porphyry footprint in Western Malargüe; Phase 1 diamond drilling began January 2026.

properties.name: El Destino
properties.tagline: 9,487-ha Cu-Au-Mo porphyry system mapped at surface in Western Malargüe; classic porphyry alteration, drill-ready, not yet tested.

properties.name: El Seguro
properties.tagline: Cu porphyry target within the 733 km² Western Malargüe project portfolio.

properties.name: Las Estrellas
properties.caption: Río Damas · Argentina
properties.tagline: Stacked copper systems — manto-type oxides in the Río Damas Formation plus porphyry Cu-Au signatures in the overlying Huincan; 144 surface rock chips returned up to 9,978 ppm Cu.
